assumptions: The scenarios tab can derive canonical bucket counts from the transcripts already loaded on AnalysisDetail.
Cells without renderable canonical transcript data should show as unknown instead of inventing a legacy numeric fallback.
The pivot grid remains legacy and should keep its existing 1-5 mean-score behavior for this wave.
discovery.summary: The analysis scenarios tab should update only the condition-scoring matrix to use the canonical five-bucket logic and winner-score display already shipped on the value-detail page, while leaving the top pivot grid on legacy counts for now. I am carrying in the assumption that this is a UI-only follow-up to the replace wave and that the existing shipped value-detail logic is the source of truth for bucket definitions, tie handling, and unknown handling.
